add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a highlight annotation over a given text rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-sticky-note-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to PDF Page
add-sticky-note-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a sticky‑note (text) annotation on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the result.

add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page
add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a "Project Overview" bookmark that links to page 5 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-nested-bookmarks-pdf.title: Create Nested Bookmarks in PDF with PdfContentEditor
create-nested-bookmarks-pdf.description: Shows how to add a parent bookmark and its child bookmarks to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-action-to-rectangle-annot.title: Add JavaScript Action to Rectangle Annotation
add-javascript-action-to-rectangle-annot.description: Shows how to create a clickable rectangle annotation in a PDF and attach a JavaScript alert using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-b.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Button
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-b.description: Demonstrates attaching a JavaScript action to a PDF form button with Aspose.Pdf.Facades to compute a total price from Quantity and UnitPrice fields.

extract-first-image-from-pdf-page-2.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page 2 as PNG
extract-first-image-from-pdf-page-2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the first image from the second page of a PDF and save it as a PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF file and save them as PNG files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

add-image-stamp-to-page-three.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page 3
add-image-stamp-to-page-three.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place an image stamp (logo.png) at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF and save the modified document.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Red Font and Transparency
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a red "Confidential" text stamp with semi‑transparent background and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

reposition-stamp-left-margin.title: Reposition Stamp on PDF Page to Left Margin
reposition-stamp-left-margin.description: Shows how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF so that it aligns 10 mm from the left edge using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.title: Replace 'Draft' with 'Final' in a PDF
replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to replace all occurrences of a specific word in a PDF document and save the result.

replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page with UUID
replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates generating a UUID and replacing the case‑sensitive placeholder "InvoiceNumber" on page 6 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preferences to single‑page layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf facades.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences-page-layout-.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences, Page Layout and Zoom Settings
read-pdf-viewer-preferences-page-layout-.description: Shows how to obtain the viewer preference flags, page layout mode, and zoom factor of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf classes.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach an external file (Terms.pdf) to an existing PDF document and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Embedded Attachment from PDF
remove-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file (attachment) from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

apply-password-protection-disable-printi.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF (Disable Printing)
apply-password-protection-disable-printi.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with a user and owner password while disabling all permissions, including printing, using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-disallow-.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Disallow Form Editing and Annotations
set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-disallow-.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to configure document privileges so that text copying is allowed while form field editing and annotation modifications are prohibited.

add-xmp-author-title-metadata.title: Add XMP Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-author-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata to bind an existing PDF and add XMP metadata fields for author and title, then save the updated document.

update-pdf-xmp-metadata-with-custom-proj.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata with Custom Project Schema
update-pdf-xmp-metadata-with-custom-proj.description: Demonstrates how to bind to an existing PDF and add custom XMP metadata fields using a custom namespace for a project identifier and version number.

fill-acroform-text-field.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-acroform-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate an AcroForm text field, fill it with a value, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

set-checkbox-field-to-true.title: Set Checkbox Field to True in PDF Form
set-checkbox-field-to-true.description: Shows how to programmatically check a checkbox field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example loads a PDF, sets the specified checkbox to true, and saves the result.

select-express-shipping-radio-button.title: Select Express Shipping Radio Button in PDF
select-express-shipping-radio-button.description: Shows how to open a PDF containing an AcroForm, set the 'ShippingMethod' radio button group to the 'Express' option, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-page7-to-high-res-png.title: Convert PDF Page 7 to High‑Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page7-to-high-res-png.description: Demonstrates how to extract a single page from a PDF and save it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter and apply LZW compression.

convert-jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG Image to Single-Page PDF
convert-jpeg-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a JPEG file, add it to a new PDF page with default margins, and save the result as a single-page PDF document.

print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Multiple Copies and Landscape Orientation
print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF file to the default printer using Aspose.Pdf, configuring two copies and landscape page orientation via printer and page settings.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder, add a red square (rectangle) annotation to the first page of each document, and save the modified PDFs to an output folder.

batch-replace-confidential-with-public.title: Batch Replace Confidential with Public in PDF Archive
batch-replace-confidential-with-public.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and replace every occurrence of the word "Confidential" with "Public" using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a folder of PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract every image from each document, and save the images into a dedicated subfolder per PDF.

batch-apply-javascript-alert-to-rectangl.title: Batch Apply JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations
batch-apply-javascript-alert-to-rectangl.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, locate rectangle (square) annotations, and attach a JavaScript alert action to each using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.description: Shows how to iterate through all PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set each document's viewer preference to full‑screen mode.

batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png.description: Demonstrates how to batch convert each page of a PDF document to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top‑Center of PDF Pages
batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, locate existing stamps on each page, and move them to a top‑center position using Aspose.Pdf's content editor.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a clickable web link annotation on page 2 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-calculate-action-to-quant.title: Add JavaScript Calculate Action to Quantity Field
add-javascript-calculate-action-to-quant.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfContentEditor, find the Quantity form field, and attach a JavaScript calculate action that updates the Total field based on Quantity and UnitPrice values.

extract-page5-images-grayscale-jpeg.title: Extract Images from Page 5 and Convert to Grayscale JPEG
extract-page5-images-grayscale-jpeg.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all images from a specific PDF page, convert each image to grayscale, and save the results as JPEG files.

center-stamps-on-page-8.title: Center Stamps on Page 8 of a PDF
center-stamps-on-page-8.description: Shows how to retrieve stamps on a specific page, compute the page's center coordinates, and move each stamp to be horizontally and vertically centered using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to replace a given string inside annotation contents on selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

hide-toolbar-menu-bar-viewer-preferences.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF Viewer Preferences
hide-toolbar-menu-bar-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-document-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF
add-document-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and provide a custom description for the attachment.

remove-attachments-by-filename-pattern.title: Remove PDF Attachments by Filename Pattern
remove-attachments-by-filename-pattern.description: Demonstrates how to delete embedded file attachments from a PDF whose names match a specific pattern (ending with "_old.pdf") using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit AES encryption and disable printing, editing, copying and other privileges with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-custom-xmp-projectid-metadata.title: Add Custom XMP ProjectID Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-projectid-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind XMP metadata to a PDF, add a custom field ProjectID with value 12345, and save the document while preserving existing properties.

add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp to PDF
add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp with multiline content, custom Arial font, size 14, and blue color, and apply it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form, reading a JSON file that maps field names to values, filling each form field with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and saving the updated PDF.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, render pages 2‑4 to PNG images at 200 DPI, and enable a transparent background for each image.

print-pdf-silently-to-network-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Network Printer
print-pdf-silently-to-network-printer.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfViewer and submit a silent print job to a network printer using its IPP URI and custom page settings.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to place a rectangle (square) annotation on page six of a PDF, set a dashed border style, and apply 50 % opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-document-open-action.title: Add JavaScript Document Open Action to PDF
add-javascript-document-open-action.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action that logs the current page number to the console when the PDF is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-pdf-image-catalog.title: Create PDF Image Catalog from Extracted Images
create-pdf-image-catalog.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor and then builds a new PDF where each image is placed as a thumbnail on its own page, producing an image catalog.

align-stamp-with-paragraph-baseline.title: Align Stamp with Paragraph Baseline on Page Five
align-stamp-with-paragraph-baseline.description: Shows how to locate the baseline of the first paragraph on page 5 using TextFragmentAbsorber and place a text stamp precisely on that baseline with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-dates-regex-pdf.title: Replace Dates in PDF Using Regex
replace-dates-regex-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor with ReplaceTextStrategy to locate dates in MM/DD/YYYY format and replace them with YYYY‑MM‑DD using a regular expression.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.description: Shows how to open a PDF with the thumbnails pane visible and set the default zoom to fit the window using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF's XMP metadata, replace the dc:creator entry with a new value, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-encrypted-attachment-with-custom-des.title: Add Encrypted Attachment with Custom Description to PDF
add-encrypted-attachment-with-custom-des.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a custom description to a PDF and then encrypting the document using AES‑256.

remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned document.

create-three-level-nested-bookmarks.title: Create Three-Level Nested Bookmarks in PDF
create-three-level-nested-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates adding hierarchical bookmarks (section, subsection, sub‑subsection) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF with 45‑degree rotation, 80% opacity, and a specific position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-config.title: Fill PDF Form Fields with Default Values from Config
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-config.description: Shows how to read default field values from a text configuration file and populate a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24‑bit BMP Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF document into a 24‑bit BMP file for legacy system compatibility.

print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.description: Shows how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with duplex (double‑sided) mode enabled and multiple collated copies.

add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill and 1pt Border
add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.description: Shows how to insert a rectangle (square) annotation into a PDF, set its interior color to light gray, and define a 1 pt border using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

add-js-validation-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Validation Button to PDF Form
add-js-validation-button-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a required text field, add a push‑button, and attach JavaScript that validates required fields and shows alerts.

add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmark to PDF
add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a bookmark that opens an external website (https://example.org) into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide Scrollbars and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to hide UI elements such as scrollbars and toolbars and turn off page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf.Facades classes.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to JSON
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preference flags (page layout and zoom) using PdfContentEditor and store them in a JSON configuration file.

add-attachment-set-modification-date.title: Add Attachment and Set Modification Date in PDF
add-attachment-set-modification-date.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF and update the document's modification date to the current UTC timestamp using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

sign-and-certificate-encrypt-pdf.title: Sign and Certificate‑Encrypt PDF
sign-and-certificate-encrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF using a private certificate and then encrypt it with a recipient's public certificate so only the intended user can open the document.

add-text-stamp-with-shadow.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to PDF
add-text-stamp-with-shadow.description: Shows how to create a gray shadow text stamp and a black main text stamp, configure font, size, alignment, and place them at the top of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-from-stream-to-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp from Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-stream-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding an image from a file stream to a Stamp object, configuring its appearance, and applying it to all pages without persisting the image to disk.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images with 150 DPI
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting a 150 DPI resolution, and converting each page to a JPEG image with specified quality using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.description: Shows how to transform a collection of PNG files into a single multi‑page PDF, placing each image on its own page using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges (1‑5, 8‑10)
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF and print them using the system default printer via Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer and PrinterSettings.

add-semi-transparent-file-attachment-ann.title: Add Semi-Transparent File Attachment Annotation to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-file-attachment-ann.description: Demonstrates how to add a file‑attachment annotation with 60% opacity to page 3 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages with Structured Naming
extract-images-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF, extract all images using Aspose.Pdf, and save them as PNG files with a consistent naming pattern.

replace-text-preserve-font.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Font Style
replace-text-preserve-font.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades while keeping the original font, size, and color on the affected pages.

add-file-attachment-with-data-relationsh.title: Add File Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-file-attachment-with-data-relationsh.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF and create a visible file‑attachment annotation whose AFRelationship is set to Data using Aspose.Pdf.

add-xmp-branding-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Branding Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-branding-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed corporate branding information such as a logo URL and brand color into a PDF using XMP metadata with Aspose.Pdf.

add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Page 4
add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.description: Demonstrates creating a multiline text stamp, aligning it to the right, positioning it at the bottom of page 4, and saving the modified PDF.

add-image-stamp-from-url-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp from URL to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-from-url-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates downloading an external image and applying it as a stamp on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-to-transparent-png-thumbnail.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Thumbnails at 300 DPI
convert-pdf-to-transparent-png-thumbnail.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, enabling a transparent background, and saving each page as a PNG image.

merge-jpeg-images-to-pdf.title: Merge JPEG Images into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf Facade
merge-jpeg-images-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine multiple JPEG files into a single PDF document, placing each image on its own page using the Aspose.Pdf and Aspose.Pdf.Facades APIs.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-with-opa.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-with-opa.description: Shows how to place a rectangle (square) annotation on the first page of a PDF, applying a custom dash pattern and 75% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, add a submit button, and attach JavaScript that shows a confirmation dialog before the form is submitted using Aspose.Pdf.

add-help-url-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add Help URL Bookmark to PDF
add-help-url-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a bookmark that opens an external documentation URL in a PDF document.

disable-zoom-controls-viewer-preferences.title: Disable Zoom Controls via Viewer Preferences
disable-zoom-controls-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to use PdfContentEditor to set viewer preferences that hide the toolbar and window UI, effectively disabling zoom controls and fixing the zoom level in a PDF.

add-file-attachment-with-description.title: Add File Attachment with Description and Creation Date
add-file-attachment-with-description.description: Shows how to attach a PDF file to a document, set its description, and assign the current creation date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Department XMP Metadata to PDF
add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add a custom XMP metadata field "Department" with the value "Finance", and save the updated PDF.

add-centered-red-bold-text-stamp.title: Add Centered Red Bold Text Stamp to PDF Page
add-centered-red-bold-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a bold, red, centered text stamp on the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.title: Add Scaled Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.description: Loads an image into a memory stream, creates an ImageStamp, scales it to 50 % using the Zoom property, and adds it to the first page of a PDF document.

fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from XML using XPath
fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, locating nodes with XPath that match AcroForm field names, and populating those fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding it to a PdfContentEditor, creating a circle annotation with a green fill and 3 pt border on page two, and saving the modified document.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to an existing PDF document using the PdfContentEditor facade API and save the result.

embed-memory-stream-as-pdf-attachment.title: Embed Memory Stream as PDF Attachment
embed-memory-stream-as-pdf-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a document attachment from a MemoryStream to an existing PDF using the PdfContentEditor facade and saving the updated file.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach several external files to an existing PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor facade.

add-document-attachment-with-description.title: Add Document Attachment with Description to PDF
add-document-attachment-with-description.description: Shows how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF and assign a descriptive label using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type-to-.title: Add Attachment with Custom MIME Type to PDF
add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type-to-.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF document and assign a custom MIME type using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete every embedded attachment from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade and save the cleaned document.

add-new-attachment-to-pdf-preserve-exist.title: Add New Attachment to PDF Without Removing Existing Attachments
add-new-attachment-to-pdf-preserve-exist.description: Demonstrates how to add a document attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor while keeping any existing attachments intact.

refresh-pdf-attachments.title: Refresh PDF Attachments by Removing and Adding Files
refresh-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to delete all existing attachments from a PDF and then add a new set of files using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.title: Attach a Downloaded File to a PDF
attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to download a file into a byte array and embed it as an attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-large-attachment-to-pdf-monitor-memo.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-to-pdf-monitor-memo.description: Shows how to attach a file larger than 10 MB to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor and verifies that memory consumption stays within a defined limit.

add-attachment-and-retrieve-name.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Retrieve Its Name
add-attachment-and-retrieve-name.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save the document, and then read back the attachment's specification name for verification.

delete-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Delete All Attachments from PDF and Verify Count
delete-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove every embedded attachment from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then confirm the attachment count is zero with PdfExtractor.

add-attachment-and-list-pdf-attachments.title: Add Attachment to PDF and List Attachments
add-attachment-and-list-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve all attachment names with PdfExtractor to verify the addition.

add-unicode-attachment-description.title: Add Document Attachment with Unicode Description
add-unicode-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF with a Unicode description using Aspose.Pdf, then extracts the attachment metadata to verify proper encoding.

add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF
add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as a document attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.title: Add Attachment and Store Checksum in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF, retrieve its checksum, and save that checksum as custom metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.title: Encrypt PDF Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with a user and owner password using Document.Encrypt, then attach the encrypted PDF to another document with PdfContentEditor.

add-and-verify-document-attachment.title: Add and Verify Document Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-document-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor, extract the attachment with PdfExtractor, and compare the extracted bytes to the original file.

enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Enable CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to set the CenterWindow viewer preference so a PDF opens centered using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

hide-pdf-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Hide PDF Menu Bar Using Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to set the HideMenubar viewer preference on a PDF and save the modified file.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-screen.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-screen.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outlines Panel
set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.description: Demonstrates how to configure the PDF viewer preference so that the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-multiple-viewer-preferences-pdf.title: Set Multiple Viewer Preferences for a PDF
set-multiple-viewer-preferences-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine viewer preferences such as CenterWindow and HideToolbar using bitwise OR and apply them to a PDF with PdfContentEditor before saving.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences
read-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfContentEditor, retrieve its viewer preference flags, and output the active settings to the console.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to read the current viewer preferences of a PDF, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

change-pdf-viewer-preferences-save.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to New File
change-pdf-viewer-preferences-save.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, modify its viewer preferences (e.g., hide menu bar, disable outline), and save the edited document to a new file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfview.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer Facade
export-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfview.description: Shows how to load a PDF with the PdfViewer facade, then save it directly into a MemoryStream for downstream processing.

hide-pdf-toolbar.title: Hide PDF Toolbar via Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-toolbar.description: Demonstrates how to hide the PDF viewer toolbar by setting the HideToolbar viewer preference using the PdfContentEditor facade.

hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.title: Hide Scrollbars Viewer Preference in PDF
hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to hide UI elements such as scrollbars and navigation controls in a PDF by setting the HideWindowUI viewer preference using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

display-pdf-title-window-caption.title: Display PDF Title in Window Caption
display-pdf-title-window-caption.description: Shows how to set a PDF document's title and enable the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the viewer's window caption.

export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Export PDF Viewer Preferences to XML
export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves its viewer preference flags via Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and serializes the flags into an XML configuration file.

apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to PDFs from JSON Config
apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading viewer preference settings from a JSON configuration file and applying them to each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-toolbar-menubar-pdf.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar for a Minimalistic PDF UI
hide-toolbar-menubar-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to hide the toolbar and menu bar in PDF viewer preferences, creating a cleaner user interface.

edit-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-verify.title: Edit PDF Viewer Preferences and Verify After Each Change
edit-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-verify.description: Loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, changes several viewer preferences (hide menu bar, page mode, fit window), retrieves the current preference flags after each modification, and saves the updated document.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-la.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-la.description: Shows how to load a PDF, change its viewer preference to a single-page layout using PdfContentEditor, and save the modified document.

set-continuous-view-mode.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
set-continuous-view-mode.description: Shows how to configure a PDF to use continuous scrolling (one‑column layout) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-ui-toggles.title: Map PDF Viewer Preferences to UI Toggles
map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-ui-toggles.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preference bitmask, convert it to a dictionary of UI toggle states, modify those states, and write the updated preferences back to the document.

toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-decrypted-pd.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Decrypted PDF
apply-viewer-preferences-to-decrypted-pd.description: The example shows how to decrypt an encrypted PDF using a password and then modify its viewer preferences such as hiding the menu bar and setting the page mode, finally saving the result.

export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml__v2.title: Export PDF Viewer Preferences to XML
export-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and serialize the results into an XML document for legacy system integration.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-hide-navigatio.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Hide Navigation Panels
set-pdf-viewer-preference-hide-navigatio.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone, which hides navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

add-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF
add-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a custom text (sticky‑note) annotation at specific coordinates on the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-clickable-web-link-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Web Link to PDF
add-clickable-web-link-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a link annotation that opens an external website when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create an image stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and place it on the second page of a PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-custom-appearan.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Custom Appearance to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-custom-appearan.description: Loads a PDF, creates a free‑text annotation using Helvetica font, size 12, blue color, and adds it to the first page before saving the document.

highlight-text-on-pdf-page.title: Highlight Text on Specific PDF Page
highlight-text-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to apply a yellow highlight annotation to a selected text rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

underline-specific-phrase-on-fourth-page.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
underline-specific-phrase-on-fourth-page.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on page 4 of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

add-red-square-annotation-with-transpare.title: Add Red Square Annotation with Transparent Fill to PDF Page
add-red-square-annotation-with-transpare.description: Demonstrates how to place a square annotation with a red border on page five of a PDF and set a semi‑transparent red fill using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page_.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page_.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, define a rectangle, and use PdfContentEditor to create a thick green circular annotation on a specific page, then save the document.

insert-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.title: Insert Line Annotation with Arrowheads into PDF
insert-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.description: Demonstrates adding a line annotation with start and end arrowheads to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation to PDF with Hover Note
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to add a popup annotation that displays a note when the user hovers over a defined area in a PDF document.

batch-add-annotations-to-pdf.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF Using PdfContentEditor
batch-add-annotations-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add multiple text and link annotations to a PDF in a single batch operation by looping over annotation definitions.

create-pdf-partially-transparent-text-an.title: Create PDF with Partially Transparent Text Annotation
create-pdf-partially-transparent-text-an.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and set its opacity to 0.5 for partial transparency using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Text Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a text annotation on the first page, set its opacity to 0.75, and save the modified document.

rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to create a text stamp, rotate it 90° and add it as an annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-custom-appearance-stamp.title: Add Custom Appearance Stamp to PDF
add-custom-appearance-stamp.description: Shows how to create a rubber‑stamp annotation with a custom appearance stream taken from an external PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-square-annotation-custom-border.title: Add Square Annotation with Custom Border Thickness
add-square-annotation-custom-border.description: Demonstrates binding an existing PDF, creating a square annotation with a 3‑point border, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-dashed-rectangle-annotation.title: Create Dashed Rectangle Annotation with PdfContentEditor
create-dashed-rectangle-annotation.description: Shows how to add a rectangle annotation with a dashed border to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-text-annotation-light-gray-backgroun.title: Add Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
add-text-annotation-light-gray-backgroun.description: Shows how to create a text annotation on a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and then set a light gray background color to improve readability on dark pages.

rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation 90° Clockwise
rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF and rotate it 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as a clickable attachment annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-javascript-alert-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to create a JavaScript link annotation that displays an alert message when clicked.

add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Tooltip Annotation to PDF
add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a text annotation that displays a tooltip on mouse hover using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-custom-dashed-line-annotation.title: Add Custom Dashed Line Annotation to PDF Diagram
add-custom-dashed-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a line annotation with a custom dash pattern to a PDF page, useful for highlighting workflow steps in diagrams.

add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-list.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet List to PDF
add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-list.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to add a multi‑line popup annotation containing bullet points to a PDF page.

apply-45-degree-rotation-to-stamp.title: Apply 45° Rotation to a Stamp Annotation
apply-45-degree-rotation-to-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp, setting its rotation to 45 degrees, and applying it to a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Right-to-Left Text Annotation to PDF
add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add a text annotation containing Arabic (right‑to‑left) Unicode text to an existing PDF and save the modified file.

add-local-hyperlink-annotation.title: Add Local Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-local-hyperlink-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a clickable rectangle that links to another page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor. The example also shows how to generate a sample PDF and ensure the required number of pages exist.

add-red-square-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Red Square Annotation to PDF
add-red-square-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add a square annotation with a bright red border on a specific page of a PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-with-html.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with HTML to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-html.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, create a free‑text annotation that contains HTML markup, and save the updated document using the PdfContentEditor facade.

custom-rubber-stamp-annotation.title: Create Custom Rubber Stamp Annotation with Vector Graphic
custom-rubber-stamp-annotation.description: Shows how to generate a PDF appearance stream containing a vector graphic and apply it to a rubber‑stamp annotation using PdfContentEditor.

add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.description: Shows how to insert a text annotation into a PDF and then set its author metadata using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-text-annotation-with-utc-creation-da.title: Add Text Annotation with UTC Creation Date
add-text-annotation-with-utc-creation-da.description: Shows how to add a sticky‑note (TextAnnotation) to a PDF page and set its CreationDate property to the current UTC time using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-subject-to-pdf-annotations.title: Assign Subject to PDF Annotations
assign-subject-to-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to set the Subject property of a TextAnnotation template and apply it to existing annotations on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

lock-text-annotation-in-pdf.title: Lock Text Annotation in PDF
lock-text-annotation-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a text annotation in a PDF document and lock it to prevent further modifications using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

hide-annotations-enable-fullscreen-viewe.title: Hide Annotations and Enable FullScreen Viewer Preference
hide-annotations-enable-fullscreen-viewe.description: Loads a PDF, marks all annotations as hidden, then uses PdfContentEditor to set the FullScreen viewer preference before saving the result.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-text-on-page-two-preserve-font-s.title: Replace Text on Page Two While Preserving Font Style
replace-text-on-page-two-preserve-font-s.description: Shows how to replace a specific string on a particular PDF page while retaining the original font, size, style, and color using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-regex-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text with Regular Expression Across PDF Pages
replace-text-regex-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to replace all occurrences of text matching a regular expression on every page of a PDF while preserving the original formatting.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-text-with-bold-style.title: Replace Text with Bold Style in PDF
replace-text-with-bold-style.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific phrase in a PDF with a new phrase while applying bold formatting, keeping the original font size unchanged.

insert-blank-page-add-header.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header to PDF
insert-blank-page-add-header.description: Loads a PDF, inserts a new blank page at the third position, and adds a centered header to every page using a TextStamp.

delete-page-from-pdf.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from an existing PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the updated document.

move-last-page-to-beginning.title: Move Last PDF Page to Beginning
move-last-page-to-beginning.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF document by inserting the original last page at the start and then deleting the duplicate using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

add-annotation-and-merge-pdfs.title: Add Annotation and Merge PDFs
add-annotation-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to the first PDF and then concatenate it with a second PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the Facades API.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to split an edited PDF into individual one‑page PDFs while preserving all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-image-annotation-with-caption.title: Insert Image Annotation with Caption into PDF
insert-image-annotation-with-caption.description: Demonstrates how to add an image as a stamp annotation at specific coordinates and place a visible text caption underneath it using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-attachment-and-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-image-attachment-and-stamp.description: Shows how to embed an image file as a document attachment and then place the same image as a stamp annotation on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Add Image Watermark to All PDFs in a Folder
add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image watermark to every PDF file in a directory using Aspose.Pdf facades and configurable settings.

batch-add-annotations-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDFs from JSON Definition
batch-add-annotations-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON job file and use Aspose.Pdf to import various annotation types from source PDFs into target PDFs in batch.

add-attachment-viewer-preferences-encryp.title: Add Attachment and Viewer Preferences, Then Encrypt PDF with User Password
add-attachment-viewer-preferences-encryp.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment and setting viewer preferences using PdfContentEditor, followed by encrypting the modified PDF with a user password via PdfFileSecurity.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a PDF
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to remove password protection from a PDF, modify its content (add a text annotation), and then apply encryption again using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to Encrypted PDF
add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, adding a file attachment without a visual annotation, and saving the updated document.

add-document-attachment-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Add Document Attachment to Multiple PDFs
add-document-attachment-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process a collection of PDF files and add the same document attachment to each using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

apply-viewer-preferences-multiple-pdfs.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a collection of PDF files and set the same viewer preferences (e.g., hide menubar, toolbar, disable page mode) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

concurrent-pdf-rotation.title: Concurrent PDF Rotation with Aspose.Pdf
concurrent-pdf-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of multiple PDF files in parallel using Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfPageEditor classes.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation to PDFs
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, delete all embedded attachments, and then add a standardized disclaimer text annotation to every page of each document.

configuration-driven-pdf-pipeline.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Processing Pipeline
configuration-driven-pdf-pipeline.description: Demonstrates using a configuration object to sequentially add document attachments, apply viewer preferences, and insert file‑attachment annotations into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference in PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF and configure the viewer to display the attachment panel using the PdfContentEditor facade.

add-attachment-to-pdf-async.title: Add Attachment to PDF Asynchronously
add-attachment-to-pdf-async.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF and save it using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor on a background thread, keeping the UI responsive.

add-large-attachment-to-pdf-with-buffere.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF Using Buffered Streaming
add-large-attachment-to-pdf-with-buffere.description: Shows how to attach a large file to a PDF while limiting memory usage by reading the file in buffered chunks.

add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.title: Add Network Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to download a file from a URL with retry-on-timeout logic and embed it as a document attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-modificatio.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Modification Using SHA-256
validate-pdf-integrity-after-modificatio.description: Shows how to modify a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verify its integrity by comparing SHA‑256 checksums of the original and edited files.

compare-pdf-file-sizes.title: Compare PDF File Sizes Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
compare-pdf-file-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, retrieve their sizes, and compare them to verify that edits have altered the document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON via XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, export them to XFDF, and wrap the XML in a JSON file for external analysis.

import-annotations-from-json.title: Import Annotations from JSON and Add to PDF
import-annotations-from-json.description: Reads annotation definitions from a JSON file, validates them, and uses PdfContentEditor to create text annotations in an existing PDF.

add-attachment-to-pdf-and-verify.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Verify with PdfExtractor
add-attachment-to-pdf-and-verify.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using the PdfContentEditor facade API and then verify the attachment exists after saving by extracting it with PdfExtractor.

viewer-preferences-persistence-test.title: Viewer Preferences Persistence Test
viewer-preferences-persistence-test.description: The example sets viewer preferences on a PDF using PdfContentEditor, saves the file, reopens it, and asserts that the preferences are retained.

verify-text-annotation-position.title: Verify Text Annotation Position on PDF Page
verify-text-annotation-position.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a text annotation using PdfContentEditor, and unit‑test that the annotation's rectangle matches the expected coordinates.

edit-pdf-with-logging.title: Edit PDF with Logging Using PdfContentEditor
edit-pdf-with-logging.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to bind a PDF, replace text, add a web link annotation, and save the result while logging each operation with timestamps and file names.

add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade while checking for missing source or attachment files and handling errors gracefully.

replace-text-pdf-with-disposal.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Proper Disposal
replace-text-pdf-with-disposal.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, replace all occurrences of a string, save the result, and correctly dispose the PdfContentEditor facade to avoid memory leaks.

replace-text-pdf-content-editor.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Automatic Disposal
replace-text-pdf-content-editor.description: Demonstrates how to replace text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor inside a using block to ensure proper disposal, and creates a sample PDF if none exists.

add-image-to-pdf-using-pdf-file-mend.title: Add Image to PDF Using PdfFileMend
add-image-to-pdf-using-pdf-file-mend.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF, binding it to a PdfFileMend facade, inserting an image onto a specific page, and saving the modified document.

simplified-pdf-editing-wrapper.title: Simplified PDF Editing Wrapper
simplified-pdf-editing-wrapper.description: Shows a wrapper class that encapsulates Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to load a PDF, replace text, add web‑link annotations, and save the edited file.

add-underlined-text-stamp-to-page-10.title: Add Underlined Text Stamp with Yellow Background to Page 10
add-underlined-text-stamp-to-page-10.description: Shows how to place a centered, underlined text stamp with a yellow background on the tenth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.
